# PERF-055 negative: scanner.Buffer is configured explicitly
lang: go
file: PERF-055-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"bufio"
	"bytes"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func ScanLinesSafe(c *gin.Context) {
	src := bytes.NewBufferString("hello\nworld\n")
	scanner := bufio.NewScanner(src)
	scanner.Buffer(src.Bytes(), 1024*1024)
	for scanner.Scan() {
		line := scanner.Text()
		_ = line
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"ok": true})
	_ = http.StatusOK
}
